definition.en-US: The learner systematically examined artefacts, configurations, outputs, or behaviors to identify patterns, relationships, inconsistencies, or causes of observed outcomes.
The learner used previously acquired theoretical knowledge, principles, or procedures to perform a practical task within the project context.
The learner initiated and made a deliberate effort to complete a task or solve a problem, regardless of outcome or correctness.
The learner performed quantitative or logical computations to determine values required for planning, configuring, or validating project components.
The learner set up or adjusted technical parameters, settings, or system attributes to achieve a specified functional outcome.
The learner identified, isolated, and corrected faults, misconfigurations, or logical errors within the project artefact or system.
The learner created a structured plan, architecture, model, or solution blueprint prior to or during system development.
The learner produced structured written, diagrammatic, or technical records describing processes, configurations, decisions, or outcomes related to the project.
The learner assessed the quality, effectiveness, or relevance of a task, process, or outcome against defined criteria or objectives.
The learner translated a design, plan, or specification into a functional system, configuration, or operational artefact.
The learner represented relationships, structures, or dependencies among components, concepts, or network elements.
The learner formulated objectives, strategies, task sequences, or resource allocations prior to executing project activities.
The learner critically examined their decisions, actions, performance, or learning processes to identify insights, strengths, weaknesses, or areas for improvement.
The learner modified an existing artefact, configuration, or approach in response to testing results, feedback, or reflective evaluation.
The learner executed systematic procedures to determine whether a system, configuration, or artefact functioned as intended.
